bug_report.summary: Export popover remains stuck in busy state ("Exporting…" button disabled) even after waiting for export completion
steps_to_reproduce: Wait for the export to finish.
expected_behaviors: Once export finishes, the Export button should re-enable and revert to its normal label (e.g., “Export”), and/or the popover should close.
User should be able to proceed with other actions (e.g., open Preferences) without the UI appearing perpetually busy.
actual_behaviors: Export popover remains visible with the Export button disabled and labeled “Exporting…” after waiting, suggesting export state is not cleared.

bug_report.summary: “Update available” modal appears unexpectedly while File menu is open, interrupting workflow
steps_to_reproduce: Launch the app and reach the main window
Open the File menu (e.g., to create a new file)
expected_behaviors: Opening the File menu should not trigger unrelated interrupting modals
If an update notification appears, it should not appear abruptly on top of an active menu interaction (or should close the menu cleanly first)
actual_behaviors: An “Update available” modal pops up in the center of the window while the File menu dropdown remains open behind it, obscuring the UI and interrupting the current action

bug_report.summary: Unexpected visual artifact/handle change on the horizontal splitter between right-side panes
steps_to_reproduce: Launch Zettlr and reach the main interface (skip the setup wizard if shown).
Observe the horizontal divider/splitter between the upper-right and lower-right panes (around the middle-right of the window).
expected_behaviors: The horizontal splitter/divider between the right-side panes should render consistently (no extra/missing handle/artifact) and match the previous build's appearance.
actual_behaviors: A small vertical UI element/artifact on the right-side horizontal splitter appears changed (added/removed/altered) compared to before (difference region approx. bbox [895, 538, 905, 584]).

bug_report.summary: Split-view tab/pane migration: activating “CustomCmd” causes the document tab to move to a different pane/tab bar
steps_to_reproduce: Open Zettlr in a layout with multiple panes/tab groups (split view).
Have a document (e.g., “CustomCmd”) open in the lower/right tab group along with other tabs (e.g., “Helpful Links”).
Click the “CustomCmd” tab (in that lower/right tab group) to activate it.
expected_behaviors: Clicking a tab should activate that document within the same pane/tab group where the tab is located.
The tab should remain in its original tab bar/pane.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the “CustomCmd” tab disappears from the lower/right tab group and appears in the upper/left editor tab bar (pane changes), effectively moving the document between panes.
